hooks.command: cd e:/cat-prep/catmap-web && file=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT' | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4) && [ -n "$file" ] && npx eslint "$file" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 || true

cmd=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) cd e:/cat-prep/catmap-web && grep -r 'AIzaSy' src/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCKED: Firebase key found in src/' && exit 1; echo 'Secret scan passed.';; esac
hooks.description: Block commits if Firebase API key detected in src/

hooks.command: echo 'Task complete. Next step: run the code-reviewer agent, then test locally before committing.'
hooks.description: Remind to run code-reviewer after task
